channel.title: Max Obermeier's Blog
channel.description: My opinions on design, software engineering, and life.

item.title: Owning Technology
item.description: The best, too much, and still not enough. Owning technology feels like an unhealthy struggle. Maybe we need to look elsewhere for the cure.

item.title: Software in the Age of Extraction
item.description: Today’s software feels broken. Here’s how I want it to change.
